subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! We have heard thy mention and have remembered thee. Give thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Remembering, the Most Bountiful. Verily, We have remembered every soul that hath turned towards Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد سمعنا ذکرک ذکرناک ان اشکر ربک الذاکر الکریم انا ذکرنا کل مقبل اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
